offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, mismatched supplier payment details cause late payments. We simplify the extraction and validation of payment details instead of manual verification.
problem: Mismatched supplier payment details leading to late payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try manual entry for payment details and mismatch alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing supplier data
